channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: S&P 500 jumps to a new record close as Micron shares lead tech rally: Live updates
item.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite rose to fresh intraday all-time highs on Tuesday, led by technology.

item.title: Trump to host Cabinet meeting at Camp David on Wednesday as Iran talks continue
item.description: Trump and his top officials will make the rare trip to the woodsy Maryland retreat to discuss issues both foreign and domestic, a White House official said.

item.title: Piper Sandler says Strait of Hormuz to remain closed for months and oil to hit new highs
item.description: Prolonged closure of Strait of Hormuz could send crude oil prices to new highs this summer.

item.title: A battle is brewing in the gold pits. Here are the winners and losers
item.description: Options volumes leaned bullish in both the SPDR Gold ETF (GLD) and VanEck Gold Miners ETF (GDX) on Tuesday.

item.title: JPMorgan says it's time to buy these unloved safe stocks that pay dividends
item.description: The bank sees an attractive entry point for low-volatility stocks. These are the companies JPMorgan rates overweight.

item.title: American Airlines picks SpaceX's Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi on more than 500 planes
item.description: American Airlines said it will install SpaceX's Starlink for inflight Wi-Fi on more than 500 of its airplanes.

item.title: Cornyn and Paxton go head-to-head in Texas Republican Senate primary after Trump endorsement
item.description: President Donald Trump last week endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Sen. John Cornyn.

item.title: U.S. conducts 'self-defense strikes' in Iran as Trump pushes for peace deal
item.description: Targets included missile launch sites and Iranian boats attempting to emplace mines.

item.title: AutoZone stock has worst day in four years, despite retailer beating Wall Street estimates
item.description: Concerns include international growth and margin compression as well as pressures from inflation, energy costs and potential supply chain disruptions.

item.title: Democratic attorneys general snub Vance's anti-fraud roundtable at White House after late invite
item.description: Vice President JD Vance is leading an initiative by the Trump administration to reduce fraud in federally funded programs that are administered by states.

item.title: Barriers grow for international students seeking U.S. jobs: The 'American dream ... is collapsing'
item.description: International graduates say a weak hiring market and changing immigration rules make it harder for them to achieve their American dream of working in the U.S.

item.title: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
item.description: Inflation and high debt levels continue cause financial anxiety for many Americans. Nonprofits can help with debt mangement.

item.title: Volvo Cars wins U.S. approval to keep importing vehicles with 'connected car' technology
item.description: Volvo Cars said Tuesday it had received approval from the U.S. allowing it to continue selling vehicles with Chinese "connected technology" in the country.

item.title: Markets suggest stocks are on solid ground and crude oil could be in for a decline, Todd Gordon says
item.description: The VIX is saying that equities are in good shape and, if a resolution of the war is near, crude oil may plummet into the $80s, and maybe $70s, per barrel.

item.title: Judges block Alabama redistricting maps that would dilute Black vote in midterms
item.description: A three-judge panel found that the 2023 congressional district maps adopted by Alabama intentionally discriminated against Black voters.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Micron Technology, AutoZone, Qualcomm, Oklo & more
item.description: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Cybersecurity stocks are surging. One looks promising into earnings
item.description: Mike Khouw is long Zscaler into earnings after the close.

item.title: SpaceX IPO filing sparks a bull market in space stocks. How to buy in
item.description: Analysts see a range of IPO beneficiaries, from suppliers to proxies -- and even competitors

item.title: Pope Leo is concerned about AI replacing human work. Traders share his concern long term
item.description: The leader of the Catholic Church warned about artificial intelligence upending the labor market. Traders on Kalshi see unemployment jumping before 2030.

item.title: Apple's surge to record highs faces a major test next month. What it must do to pass
item.description: The iPhone maker's WWDC kicks off on June 8, offering Apple another chance to impress Wall Street on AI.

item.title: BP shares fall after board removes chairman Albert Manifold over 'serious’ conduct concerns
item.description: The board of British energy major BP on Tuesday announced it had unanimously decided to remove Chairman Albert Manifold with immediate effect.

item.title: Your credit card could help cut the cost of your summer vacation
item.description: CNBC Select goes over some of the most overlooked credit card benefits that could help you save money on your summer travels.

item.title: Brent oil jumps more than 3% after Iran vows to retaliate for U.S. strikes
item.description: President Trump earlier said talks with Iran were "proceeding nicely," while warning that the U.S. could resume military action if discussions were to collapse.

item.title: Wells Fargo to offer mortgage incentives on 3D printed homes with Icon
item.description: Wells Fargo will provide a 50 basis point lender credit to buyers of Icon homes using its mortgages.

item.title: Ferrari shares slump 6% after new electric vehicle is bashed online. Why Wall Street says buy the dip
item.description: The Italian luxury car maker unveiled its first all-electric vehicle, called Luce. Online critics were unimpressed.

item.title: ‘The market has spoken’: Ferrari shares fall after carmaker unveils first fully electric vehicle
item.description: Shares of luxury carmaker Ferrari fell sharply on Tuesday morning, shortly after the company launched its first fully electric vehicle.

item.title: The Avis 'circus' messed with the transports sector this year. Josh Brown finds the real Best Stocks in the space
item.description: Josh Brown and Sean Russo take a look at some of the transportation names in their Best Stocks list.

item.title: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston to step down after 19 years at helm of cloud storage pioneer
item.description: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston, who started the cloud storage company when he was 24, plans to step down and assume the role of executive chairman.

item.title: 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' is Disney's lowest-ever Star Wars film opening
item.description: Disney's "The Mandalorian and Grogu" tallied and estimated $82 million in domestic ticket sales through its first three days in theaters.

item.title: Pentagon spars with SpaceX over Starlink price hike during Iran war: Reuters
item.description: The disagreement over Starlink's use on LUCAS suicide drones is part of increasing tensions between SpaceX and the Pentagon over pricing in recent months.
